name: Monetr
short_description: Self-hosted personal finance app with budgeting, bank sync, and spending insights.
description: Monetr is a self-hosted personal finance app for envelope budgeting and expense tracking. It supports optional bank sync via Plaid for automatic transaction import, detailed spending reports, and local file storage — running privately on your own hardware with PostgreSQL and Valkey.
usecases: Create envelope budgets to allocate income across categories like groceries, rent, and subscriptions, and track spending against each envelope in real time.
Connect bank accounts via Plaid to automatically import transactions and keep your budget reconciled without manual entry.
Self-host your entire financial data stack — Monetr, its database, and cache — so no financial information ever leaves your own server.
notes: Set MONETR_DB_PASSWORD to a strong secret before first run — both the monetr app and the postgres container must share the same value.
Bank account sync requires a Plaid API key; set MONETR_ALLOW_SIGN_UP=false after creating your account to lock registration.
